name: midi-player-app
description: Plays MIDI files into any Windows app via simulated keypresses, with a real-time piano-roll visualizer.

scripts.build:zip: call build-portable.bat && electron-builder --win --x64 -c.win.target=dir && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$z='dist/MIDI-Player-portable.zip'; if (Test-Path $z) { Remove-Item $z -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path dist/win-unpacked/* -DestinationPath $z -CompressionLevel Optimal; $i = Get-Item $z; Write-Host ('Created ' + $i.FullName + ' (' + [math]::Round($i.Length/1MB,1) + ' MB)')"
